nasb.text: And He told His disciples that a boat should stand ready for Him because of the crowd, so that they would not crowd Him;

esv.text: And he told his disciples to have a boat ready for him because of the crowd, lest they crush him,

cnv.text: 因為人多，耶穌就吩咐門徒為他預備一隻小船，免得眾人擁擠他。

ccb.text: 耶稣见人多，就吩咐门徒为祂预备一条小船，以免人群拥挤祂。

csbs.text: 由于人多，耶稣就吩咐他的门徒为他预备一条小船，免得众人拥挤他。
